case_title: JAMIE ESCAMILLA VS. AVI CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESCAMILLA, JAMIE AS TO DEFENDANT AVI CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA NATALIE'S GALLERY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
